failure.message:

failure.message: 既定 USS 'Packages/jp.hidano.vtuber-system-base.ui-toolkit-shell/Runtime.CommonUi/Controls/VsbSlider.uss' を StyleSheet として読めない（パッケージ同梱の確認） Expected: not null But was: null

100 LoadAsync submissions took 75.956ms; this is the entire main-thread work the UI does in one frame while triggering ~100MB worth of concurrent asset I/O. Budget is < 16.67ms. Expected: less than 16.670000000000002d But was: 75.956400000000002d
EmptyTabShell.uxml must be reachable at 'Packages/jp.hidano.vtuber-system-base.ui-toolkit-shell/Runtime.UxmlUss/EmptyTabShell.uxml' Expected: not null But was: null
NotificationBar.uxml must be reachable at 'Packages/jp.hidano.vtuber-system-base.ui-toolkit-shell/Runtime.UxmlUss/NotificationBar.uxml' Expected: not null But was: null
TabBar.uxml must be reachable at 'Packages/jp.hidano.vtuber-system-base.ui-toolkit-shell/Runtime.UxmlUss/TabBar.uxml' for the bundled default skin Expected: not null But was: null
At least one field should have been filled from package defaults Expected: greater than 0 But was: 0
Default root UXML must exist at Packages/jp.hidano.vtuber-system-base.ui-toolkit-shell/Runtime.UxmlUss/TabBar.uxml Expected: not null But was: null
